name: Christopher Krügel

work.note: The official UCSB-hosted CV identifies him as a professor in the Department of Computer Science at the University of California, Santa Barbara, and the ranking page also places him there.

tracking.note: Enriched from the imported ranking-page seed using an official UCSB-hosted CV.

sources.note: The ranking page provides a DBLP author id and a UC Santa Barbara affiliation for the imported seed.

The official UCSB-hosted CV says he is a professor at UC Santa Barbara, a former postdoctoral researcher at UC Santa Barbara, and earned both his Ph.D. and M.Sc. in Computer Science from Technical University Vienna.

summary: UC Santa Barbara professor. An official UCSB-hosted CV says he was previously a postdoctoral researcher at UC Santa Barbara and earned both his Ph.D. and M.Sc. in Computer Science from Technical University Vienna.

undergraduate.note: Not yet identified from the current official sources.

masters.note: The official UCSB-hosted CV says he earned a Dipl.-Ing. (M.Sc.) in Computer Science from Technical University Vienna.

phd.note: The official UCSB-hosted CV says he earned a Dr.techn. (Ph.D.) in Computer Science from Technical University Vienna with advisor Prof. Dr. Mehdi Jazayeri.

postdoc.note: The official UCSB-hosted CV lists a postdoctoral researcher position at the Reliable Software Group, University of California at Santa Barbara.
